headline: Should You Buy Occidental Petroleum Corporation (OXY)’s Shares?
summary: Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY) is one of the 10 Best Long-Term Stocks to Buy Now According to Warren Buffett. Oil giant Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:OXY)’s shares are up by 19% over the past year and 17% year-to-date. It is one of several oil stocks in Berkshire Hathaway’s filings. It disclosed a $332 million stake courtesy […]

headline: Here's How BP Enhances Financial Strength With Deleveraging Efforts
summary: BP accelerates debt reduction through asset sales, cost savings and capital discipline to strengthen its balance sheet by 2027.
